pr.title: Record: Full GPTQ + LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon + BigramHash 3072 (val_bpb 1.1163, 3-seed mean)

output.summary: Uses Full Hessian GPTQ, Parallel Muon optimizer, and a coverage-focused BigramHash 3072×80 to squeeze an 11-layer model into the 16MB budget.
techniques: Full Hessian GPTQ with column reordering and Cholesky compensation
Parallel Muon optimizer with Parameter Banking and async comms
BigramHash 3072×80 using narrower embeddings for more buckets
